mapper.select: SELECT id, event_id, event_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status, retry_count, next_retry_at, last_error, created_at, updated_at FROM event_outbox WHERE status IN (0, 2) AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now}) ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE event_outbox SET status = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE event_outbox SET status = 2, retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
